name: @action-llama/action-llama
description: Automated development agents triggered by cron or webhooks. BYOM — bring your own model.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x dist/cli/main.js && npm run build:assets
scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p dist/agents/definitions/{dev,reviewer,devops} && cp src/agents/definitions/dev/AGENTS.md src/agents/definitions/dev/agent-definition.json dist/agents/definitions/dev/ && cp src/agents/definitions/reviewer/AGENTS.md src/agents/definitions/reviewer/agent-definition.json dist/agents/definitions/reviewer/ && cp src/agents/definitions/devops/AGENTS.md src/agents/definitions/devops/agent-definition.json dist/agents/definitions/devops/
